items: Most art assets still outstanding after the native-3D rework
Mission content beyond the first playable

barRaise.topFinding: Targeted delta pass, not a carry-forward: HEAD is still ca762fd (v0.99.40, zero commits since the 2026-07-11 full 35-lens fan-out, tree byte-identical bar the known M CLAUDE.md class_name-count edit), but the work queue moved - queue-drain-hourly split off hbh-autopause-horde-day-signal-2026-07-14, and verifying it read-only confirmed a real reliability regression at HEAD. The auto_pause autoload (project.godot:29) exposes four player-facing toggles in Settings (settings.gd:920-923, auto_pause_horde_day defaults true) but its connect_wave_director / connect_command_post / connect_economy functions have zero callers anywhere in source/ (grep-confirmed), so the subsystem never subscribes to any signal and all four auto-pause triggers are silent no-ops - a clean instance of HBH's documented silent-no-op / orphaned-wiring hazard family. Compounding it, wave_director.gd declares only all_waves_cleared (L7) and never horde_day_announced, so even the auto_pause.gd:88 has_signal guard would fail closed. Opened as reliability-01 (HIGH, P20); the fix is partly queued (horde-day slice) but the root cause is broader - wire all three connect_* calls from the 3D bootstrap and re-port the horde_day_announced signal. Reliability drops 89->82; health holds at 87 (86.8 pre-round) under no-veto weighting, one lens of 35. Both hard rules pass (GDD ends </html>; colorblind_mode declared once), no BLOCK. Aging: observability-01 and cost-economics-01 cross to runsOpen 5 = chronic, joining the five 2026-07-10 chronics; the observability<->cost tension is now chronic. The 7-day forced-full-pass boundary is 2026-07-18.

actions.title: Auto-pause subsystem is dead-wired: auto_pause.gd connect_wave_director/connect_command_post/connect_economy have zero callers in source/, and wave_director.gd never declares horde_day_announced, so all four player-facing auto-pause triggers (settings.gd:920-923) are silent no-ops. Wire the connect_* calls from the 3D bootstrap and re-port the horde_day_announced signal.
Build the mission data layer (R3D-04) so campaign missions carry authored objectives, wave scripts, and win conditions instead of loading identical sandbox runs.
Add a debug_flags-gated per-run frame-time-vs-alive-count logger so perf drift on the enemy field is visible across sessions without a manual profiler pass.
Standardize on fully-qualified skill ids at invocation sites; project-canonical-audit, handler-audit, and bar-raise collide across namespaces.

deferred.title: The .git repo is ~794 MB (313 MiB packed) and approaching GitHub's 1 GB ceiling; the removed pack blobs still live in history, so a purge/LFS migration would reclaim them.
deferred.reason: history rewrite / LFS migration is a Nick decision

deferred.title: 16 of 37 buildings on real models (rest placeholder boxes) and all 8 enemy archetypes share one placeholder mesh.
deferred.reason: art-delivery gated, same gate as hbh-asset-production-pass (blocked-on-user since 2026-06-10)

deferred.title: Finals and placeholder boxes coexist across the roster so silhouette discipline and the locked section 15 register are not yet uniformly readable.
Pick the animated-vs-instanced crowd render path; the use_crowd3d A/B seam is wired and the alive cap now bounds both.
Mortend Bold display font ships with 'free' provenance and no pinned redistribution grant; confirm a grant or swap for an OFL/CC0 display face.
deferred.reason: owner/external license check; far smaller exposure than the removed pack sprites

deferred.title: Renumber off the v0.99.x band, which reads as 1.0-imminent while the game sits at milestone 4 of 8.
deferred.reason: blocked on a Nick decision about the versioning scheme

deferred.title: Add a SAVE_VERSION migration dispatch and a full research tech-tree save block.
deferred.reason: no 3D research consumer yet; premature pre-M4-lock

deferred.title: Remove the 11 disabled scheduled-task husks still registered.
deferred.reason: removal requires the app closed; X:\Claude\restart-cleanup.ps1 covers it

deferred.title: The game ships fully silent with no audio assets on disk.
deferred.reason: on-plan; silent MVP is the dev's explicit definition, audio is v1.0 scope with a tracked manifest

barRaise.reconcileNote: Targeted delta pass 2026-07-15 (day 4 since the 2026-07-11 full fan-out). Skip-gate did NOT fire: 3 of 4 conditions held (0 commits since 2026-07-11, HEAD ca762fd; tree byte-identical, only M CLAUDE.md class_name edit; no BLOCK) but condition 4 broke - queue-drain-hourly added hbh-autopause-horde-day-signal-2026-07-14 (2026-07-14T21:41Z, after last bar-raise). Verified read-only: auto_pause subsystem dead-wired at HEAD (connect_wave_director/connect_command_post/connect_economy have zero callers in source/; wave_director.gd declares only all_waves_cleared, never horde_day_announced). Opened reliability-01 (HIGH P20); reliability 89->82. 34 other lens scores carried from 2026-07-11; health 87 (86.8 pre-round, no-veto weighting). openFindings aged +1: playability-01/strategic-kill-this-01/skill-trigger-collisions-01/asset-pipeline-01/art-direction-consistency-01 now runsOpen 6; observability-01 and cost-economics-01 cross to runsOpen 5 = CHRONIC and escalate to constellation. tensions aged +1 (perf/maint 16, perf/arch 14, scale/art 14, obs/cost 5=now chronic). Both hard rules pass. bar-raise-hbh husk disabled. Queue: 5 pending HBH items (was 4; +the autopause item); workQueueDepth field owned by queue tooling, not mutated here. No duplicate item enqueued - reliability-01 dedupes on the existing autopause item, whose scope should widen from the horde-day slice to the whole subsystem. Standing queue-hygiene note holds: hbh-readme-provenance-visibility-reconcile-2026-07-11 still pending though the reconcile shipped v0.99.40 (compliance-data-steward-02 closed 2026-07-12).
